attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NPSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY AS PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY,
NPOR.BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT AS BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,-99998) AS PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY,           
COALESCE(DTCWPKEY.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS DELIVER_TO_CISCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY ,
COALESCE(NPRLDA.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY,-99998) AS PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY,
COALESCE(STEXPOD.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,'N') AS CURRENT_RECORD_FLG,            
COALESCE(NGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-998) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
COALESCE(NGLA.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK') AS DD_BK_COMPANY_CD,  
COALESCE(NGLA.BK_PROJECT_CODE,'UNKNOW') AS DD_BK_PROJECT_CD,
COALESCE(NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CODE,'UNK') AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
COALESCE(NGLA.BK_DEPARTMENT_CODE,'UNKNOW') AS DD_BK_DEPARTMENT_CD, 
COALESCE(NGLA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,'UNKNO') AS DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
COALESCE(NGLA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE,'UNK') AS DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD, 
COALESCE(NPSD.PURCHASE_ORDER_LN_SHIPMENT_KEY,-999) AS PD_PO_LINE_SHIPMENT_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,               
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS  EDW_UPDATE_DTM,                
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER     ,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE  
FROM
(
SELECT
STPOD.PO_HEADER_ID,
STPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
STPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
STPOD.REVISION_NUM,
STPOD.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,
STPOD.GLOBAL_NAME,
STPOD.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
STPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
STPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
STPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID /*CBM GL chnages --anpaidip*/
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_DISTRI_ARCHIVE_ALL STPOD
UNION ALL
SELECT
EXPOD.PO_HEADER_ID,
EXPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,
EXPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID,
EXPOD.REVISION_NUM,
EXPOD.LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG,
EXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME,
EXPOD.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID,
EXPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,
EXPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
EXPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID /*CBM GL chnages --anpaidip*/
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_MF_PO_DISTRI_ARCHIVE_ALL EXPOD
) STEXPOD

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON ( STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPSD
ON ( STEXPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID = NPSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPSD.SS_CD )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO
ON ( NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = STEXPOD.PO_HEADER_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPO.SS_CD )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_REVISION NPOR
ON ( NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY = NPOR.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
AND STEXPOD.REVISION_NUM = NPOR.BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT )

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT EEPAPF.PERSON_ID,EEPAPF.GLOBAL_NAME,NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY 
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_EL_PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F EEPAPF,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP
WHERE NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID =EEPAPF.EMPLOYEE_NUMBER ) DTCWPKEY
ON ( DTCWPKEY.PERSON_ID=STEXPOD.DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID 
AND DTCWPKEY.GLOBAL_NAME=STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME )

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT NPRLD.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY, NPRLD.PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB_KEY, EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID, EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME,SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT /*CBM GL changes --anpaidip*/
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQN_LINE_DISTRIB NPRLD,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE NPRL,
$$ETLVWDB.EL_PO_REQ_LINES_ALL EPRL
WHERE ( EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID IS NOT NULL OR EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID <> -9999 )
AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME 
AND EPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID=NPRL.SK_PR_LINE_ID_INT
AND NPRL.SS_CD=NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND NPRL.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY = NPRLD.PURCHASE_REQUISITION_LINE_KEY 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID , EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME,SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT ORDER BY EPRL.REQUISITION_LINE_ID, EPRL.GLOBAL_NAME, EPRL.LINE_LOCATION_ID ) = 1 ) NPRLDA /*CBM GL changes --anpaidip */
ON ( STEXPOD.LINE_LOCATION_ID = NPRLDA.LINE_LOCATION_ID
AND STEXPOD.REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID = NPRLDA.SK_REQ_DISTRIB_ID_INT /*CBM GL Changes --anpaidip*/
AND STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME= NPRLDA.GLOBAL_NAME )

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON ( STEXPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSOB.SS_CODE ) 
  
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA   
ON ( STEXPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )

SELECT
PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID            	,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              	,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               	,
PO_HEADER_ID                  	,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               	,
DISTRIBUTION_NUM              	,
PO_LINE_ID                    	,
LINE_LOCATION_ID              	,
CODE_COMBINATION_ID           	,
QUANTITY_ORDERED              	,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             	,
CREATION_DATE                 	,
CREATED_BY                    	,
PO_RELEASE_ID                 	,
QUANTITY_DELIVERED            	,
QUANTITY_BILLED               	,
QUANTITY_CANCELLED            	,
REQ_HEADER_REFERENCE_NUM      	,
REQ_LINE_REFERENCE_NUM        	,
REQ_DISTRIBUTION_ID           	,
DELIVER_TO_LOCATION_ID        	,
DELIVER_TO_PERSON_ID          	,
RATE_DATE                     	,
RATE                          	,
AMOUNT_BILLED                 	,
ACCRUED_FLAG                  	,
ENCUMBERED_FLAG               	,
ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT             	,
UNENCUMBERED_QUANTITY         	,
UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT           	,
FAILED_FUNDS_LOOKUP_CODE      	,
GL_ENCUMBERED_DATE            	,
GL_ENCUMBERED_PERIOD_NAME     	,
GL_CANCELLED_DATE             	,
DESTINATION_TYPE_CODE         	,
DESTINATION_ORGANIZATION_ID   	,
DESTINATION_SUBINVENTORY      	,
ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY            	,
ATTRIBUTE1                    	,
ATTRIBUTE2                    	,
ATTRIBUTE3                    	,
ATTRIBUTE4                    	,
ATTRIBUTE5                    	,
ATTRIBUTE6                    	,
ATTRIBUTE7                    	,
ATTRIBUTE8                    	,
ATTRIBUTE9                    	,
ATTRIBUTE10                   	,
ATTRIBUTE11                   	,
ATTRIBUTE12                   	,
ATTRIBUTE13                   	,
ATTRIBUTE14                   	,
ATTRIBUTE15                   	,
WIP_ENTITY_ID                 	,
WIP_OPERATION_SEQ_NUM         	,
WIP_RESOURCE_SEQ_NUM          	,
WIP_REPETITIVE_SCHEDULE_ID    	,
WIP_LINE_ID                   	,
BOM_RESOURCE_ID               	,
BUDGET_ACCOUNT_ID             	,
ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID            	,
VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID           	,
DESTINATION_CONTEXT           	,
SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID        	,
REVISION_NUM                  	,
LATEST_EXTERNAL_FLAG          	,
REQUEST_ID                    	,
PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID        	,
PROGRAM_ID                    	,
PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE           	,
GOVERNMENT_CONTEXT            	,
PREVENT_ENCUMBRANCE_FLAG      	,
USSGL_TRANSACTION_CODE        	,
PROJECT_ID                    	,
TASK_ID                       	,
EXPENDITURE_TYPE              	,
PROJECT_ACCOUNTING_CONTEXT    	,
EXPENDITURE_ORGANIZATION_ID   	,
ACCRUE_ON_RECEIPT_FLAG        	,
GL_CLOSED_DATE                	,
EXPENDITURE_ITEM_DATE         	,
ORG_ID                        	,
END_ITEM_UNIT_NUMBER          	,
KANBAN_CARD_ID                	,
AWARD_ID                      	,
MRC_RATE_DATE                 	,
MRC_RATE                      	,
MRC_ENCUMBERED_AMOUNT         	,
MRC_UNENCUMBERED_AMOUNT       	,
RECOVERABLE_TAX               	,
NONRECOVERABLE_TAX            	,
RECOVERY_RATE                 	,
TAX_RECOVERY_OVERRIDE_FLAG    	,
OKE_CONTRACT_LINE_ID          	,
OKE_CONTRACT_DELIVERABLE_ID   	,
AMOUNT_ORDERED                	,
AMOUNT_DELIVERED              	,
AMOUNT_CANCELLED              	,
DISTRIBUTION_TYPE             	,
AMOUNT_TO_ENCUMBER            	,
INVOICE_ADJUSTMENT_FLAG       	,
DEST_CHARGE_ACCOUNT_ID        	,
DEST_VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID      	,
QUANTITY_FINANCED             	,
AMOUNT_FINANCED               	,
QUANTITY_RECOUPED             	,
AMOUNT_RECOUPED               	,
RETAINAGE_WITHHELD_AMOUNT     	,
RETAINAGE_RELEASED_AMOUNT     	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY     	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1             	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2             	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4             	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5             	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6             	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7             	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8             	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9             	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19            	,
GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20            	,
GES_UPDATE_DATE               	,
GLOBAL_NAME                   	,
ACTION_CD                     	,
CREATE_DATETIME  	,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_MF_PO_DISTRI_ARCHIVE_ALL STEXPOD
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION NPSD ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE STEXPOD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID = NPSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND STEXPOD.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPSD.SS_CD )
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PURCHASE_ORDER NPO ,$$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_REVISION NPOR ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE NPO.SK_PURCHASE_ORDR_HEADER_ID_INT = STEXPOD.PO_HEADER_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NPO.SS_CD
AND NPO.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY = NPOR.PURCHASE_ORDER_KEY 
AND STEXPOD.REVISION_NUM = NPOR.BK_PO_REVISION_NUM_INT)
OR NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB , $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT NGLA,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
WHERE STEXPOD.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID = NSOB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NSOB.SS_CODE
AND STEXPOD.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = NGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT
AND NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = NGLA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NGLA.SS_CODE)
